sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet for BLUE_1417_TESA_TAPE part number MSV-100006 supplied by ㈜케이원코퍼레이션 to ㈜H&abyz.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports part approval documentation including revision history, raw material list, QC process control plan, inspection criteria, and packaging specification.
keyPoints: Applicable models are G1417CW, G1417FW, G1417CWP, and G1417FWP.
Supplier approval dates and approval sheet date are recorded as 2025.03.12.
Raw material list identifies tesa 70465 double tape made by tesa.
QC process controls cover receiving inspection, lamination, die cutting, cutting, inspection/packing, outgoing inspection, and shipping.
Packaging specification defines small packaging, box packing, and stacking limits.

reviewFlags.reason: Source metadata authoritySignal is FDA, but the provided source text does not mention FDA or any regulatory authority.
No external standards are explicitly identified in the source text.
Revision appears as Rev. 00 on the cover and Rev. 0 in revision/control-plan sections.
Some extracted text appears converted from spreadsheet cells and includes minor OCR or parsing noise, such as 'Produst/Part' and comma-separated layout artifacts.
